instructions:
Issue #1 ('Upgrade Python to 3.12') has been completed. Issue #2 ('Add retry logic to API client') is still in progress.

1. Add a comment to issue #1 explaining that the Python upgrade to 3.12 has been deployed to production
2. Close issue #1
3. Add a comment to issue #2 with a status update that retry logic implementation is underway and will be ready by end of sprint

files.content:
from flask import Flask
app = Flask(__name__)

issues.title: Upgrade Python to 3.12
issues.body: We need to upgrade from Python 3.10 to 3.12 for performance improvements and new language features.

issues.title: Add retry logic to API client
issues.body: The API client should retry failed requests with exponential backoff. Currently, any transient network failure causes immediate errors to the user.

eval_criteria.description: Issue #1 has a resolution comment mentioning production or deployed
Issue #2 has a status comment mentioning retry
